name: ml-fastvit
description: This repository contains the official implementation of the research paper, "FastViT: A Fast Hybrid Vision Transformer using Structural Reparameterization" ICCV 2023
description_ja: このリポジトリは研究論文「FastViT: A Fast Hybrid Vision Transformer using Structural Reparameterization」（ICCV 2023）の公式実装を含みます
